quizzes.title: Water Damage Restoration — Essentials: Knowledge Check

questions.questionText: According to the lesson, what does water damage restoration begin with?
questions.sourceRef: Water Damage Fundamentals — Categories and Classes of Water Damage

questions.questionText: Into how many categories is water grouped?
questions.sourceRef: Water Damage Fundamentals — Categories and Classes of Water Damage

questions.questionText: Water is grouped into categories according to what?
options: The size of the affected area
questions.sourceRef: Water Damage Fundamentals — Categories and Classes of Water Damage

questions.questionText: Affected materials are grouped into classes according to what?
questions.sourceRef: Water Damage Fundamentals — Categories and Classes of Water Damage

questions.questionText: In the lesson, what is grouped by the rate of evaporation required?
questions.sourceRef: Water Damage Fundamentals — Categories and Classes of Water Damage

questions.questionText: Understanding the distinctions between categories and classes guides which of the following, according to the lesson?
options: Safe handling, drying strategy, and documentation
Only the final invoicing of the job
Only the choice of cleaning chemicals
Only the disposal of waste materials
questions.sourceRef: Water Damage Fundamentals — Categories and Classes of Water Damage

questions.questionText: Which statement correctly matches how the lesson describes the two groupings?
options: Water is grouped by contamination level; materials are grouped by the rate of evaporation required
Water is grouped by rate of evaporation; materials are grouped by contamination level
Both water and materials are grouped by contamination level
Both water and materials are grouped by the rate of evaporation required
questions.sourceRef: Water Damage Fundamentals — Categories and Classes of Water Damage
